title: NotebookLM Changed Completely: Here's What Matters (in 2026)
summary: Jeff Su reviews NotebookLM's 2026 updates, detailing its three-column interface and Studio panel capabilities. The tool generates reports, slides, infographics, mind maps, data tables, video overviews, quizzes, flashcards, and audio summaries from source documents. Su ranks features into Tier 1 (reports, slides, infographics, mind maps) and Tier 2 tools, and shares prompt templates and workflows for creating finished content from raw sources.
